collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (4 total Queries, 4 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `users`.*, `s`.`name` as `sponsor_name`, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u2 WHERE u2.sponsor_id = users.id) as ref_count FROM `users` LEFT JOIN `users` `s` ON `s`.`id` = `users`.`sponsor_id` ORDER BY `users`.`id` DESC
